name: Fleet Transport Toll Parking
terminologyNote: Istilahi za usafiri zimewekwa kwa matumizi ya soko: fleet ni kundi la magari ya kazi, tracker ni kifuatiliaji cha GPS, toll ni ada ya barabara, parking ni maegesho, maintenance ni matengenezo, fuel ni mafuta, service ni huduma au service ya gari kulingana na muktadha, insurance ni bima, depreciation ni kushuka thamani, na operating cost ni gharama ya kuendesha. Thibitisha ada, bei ya mafuta, bima, usajili na matokeo na mamlaka au mtoa huduma.
